actorTitle: Vietnam Coworking Space Lead Scraper with Emails
shortDescription: Scrape coworking space leads from Google Maps in Vietnam and extract emails when available.
longDescription: This Actor searches Google Maps for coworking spaces in Vietnam, extracts business details, and attempts to find email addresses from available websites. It is useful for office brokers, business-services vendors, HR platforms, commercial property firms, workplace suppliers, and B2B sales teams.
targetUser: Office brokers, business-services vendors, HR platforms, commercial property firms, workplace suppliers, and B2B sales teams.
buyerPainPoint: Workplace providers and brokers need current coworking prospects but often spend hours finding locations and checking public contact details manually.
differentiation: Coworking-space-specific Google Maps discovery with optional website email extraction and lead-quality scoring.
